items.title: AI is transforming science – more researchers need access to these powerful tools for discovery
items.description: Five years ago, our AlphaFold AI system solved the 50-year grand challenge of protein structure prediction. But that's not the whole story.

items.title: The skies for American Airlines are clearer than you think
items.description: Robert Isom is steering American Airlines through a very particular kind of turbulence.

items.title: Victoria’s Secret CEO says new customers are embracing the escape provided by the glamorous brand: ‘We were living in a beige world for awhile’
items.description: Maximalism is back at Victoria's Secret.

items.title: Lowe’s CEO used to make $4.35 an hour working at Target. His secret to climbing the corporate ladder was volunteering for jobs ‘nobody else wanted’
items.description: “I had to find a way to differentiate myself,” Marvin Ellison said.

items.title: As baby boomers are forced to ‘unretire’ because they’ve not saved enough, 6-year-olds in Germany will soon have retirement accounts
items.description: Millions of baby boomers can’t afford to retire. It’s a fate that Gen Alpha in Germany may never have to face under new plans.
